Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes to perform SW-AE Assign Reviewers after SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-AE Assign Reviewers following SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Declined measured as the duration until a new reviewer is successfully assigned (i.e., until SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Reviewer Declined and Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Unavailable when both occur in sequence
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Reviewer No Response across all variants where this transition exists
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Reviewer Declined, defined as the time from the preceding SW-AE Assign Reviewers to the subsequent SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Declined to Assign a Different Editor in cases involving editor reassignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late in high-delay variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that eventually reach a decision without further revision loops
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Declined to Unassign Reviewer when explicitly logged as a corrective action
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Unassign Reviewer'

Name: Average time it takes for the process to recover from SW-Reviewer Declined by reaching the next SW-Reviewer Agreed, compared against the average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
